category_sources: source_facts.description says GTK+ 3 is a toolkit for creating graphical user interfaces; official GTK 3 docs describe Gtk as the GTK toolkit.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gtk+3; official GTK 3 docs show API Version 3.0 and Library Version 3.24.
docs_sources: Official GTK documentation site provides GTK 3 API documentation at docs.gtk.org/gtk3/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GTK 3 documentation lists Source as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gtk/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says toolkit for creating graphical user interfaces; official GTK 3 docs identify the GTK toolkit and API version 3.0.
